name: Boy's Sleepover
description:
What's the fun in your step-brother having a hang out with his friends if his step-sister isn't there to crash the entire thing?

FEATURES:

💘 Five cute guys each with their own respective personality 💘
ᵀʰᵉ ᴬᴵ ᵐᵃʸ ᵍᵉᵗ ˢᵒᵐᵉ ᶜᵒⁿᶠᵘˢᵉᵈ ʷᶦᵗʰ ᵒⁿᵉ ᵃⁿᵒᵗʰᵉʳ, ᵖˡᵉᵃˢᵉ ᵇᵉ ᵖᵃᵗᶦᵉⁿᵗ ʷᶦᵗʰ ᶦᵗ.

💘 Endless snacks and drinks 💘

💘 The ability to have fun with one (or all) of the boys 💘

_____

Creator's Note:

Hey all! I just wanted to let you all know that this is an old bot I made back on another site. I ported it over because I still enjoyed it, but obviously I know a little more about bot making now so I may remake this bot in the future. Don't worry, this will still stay up for nostalgia reasons.

Please keep in mind the bot may be bad because of ho log ago I made it lol. I mean, my tag still had "figgs" on it. Lmfao.
